# Agentic Design System

> An open-source, repo-local design governance system for coding agents. ADS turns UI work into a brief, rendered browser evidence, a review packet, and decision provenance.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://agentic-design-system.vercel.app/): Product overview and one complete UI review loop.
- [MCP lab](https://agentic-design-system.vercel.app/mcp): The local three-tool MCP contract and a verified run.
- [MCP contract](https://agentic-design-system.vercel.app/mcp/contract.json): Machine-readable tool sequence, resources, and boundaries.
- [Decision trace](https://agentic-design-system.vercel.app/trace/002): A rendered repair case with frozen evidence.

## Source

- [Repository](https://github.com/aa-on-ai/agentic-design-system): Skills, workflows, verification scripts, and documentation.
- [ads-mcp package](https://github.com/aa-on-ai/agentic-design-system/tree/main/packages/ads-mcp): Local stdio MCP implementation.
